Calendar minLess = createTime(GMT, testTime - min, 100); // -1 min

translation: def _createTime(zone: object, time: object, millisecond: object) -> datetime:
calendar = datetime.now() if zone is None else datetime.now(tz=pytz.timezone(str(zone)))
calendar = calendar.replace(year=1970, month=1, day=1, hour=(hour // 10000), minute=(min // 100), second=sec, microsecond=millisecond*1000)
